name: Gone All Day Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the tomato soup, water/wine, and flour until smooth.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients with the mixture in a covered roasting pan.
3. Bake at 275 degrees for 4-5 hours.
4. When ready to serve, adjust seasoning if desired.
5. Coleslaw is a nice winter accompaniment or serve fresh tomatoes on a bed of lettuce in summer.
